query:
INSERT INTO audit_logs (
                user_id,
                action,
                resource_type,
                resource_id,
                old_values,
                new_values,
                status
            )
            VALUES (
                $1,
                'change_role',
                'user',
                $1,
                jsonb_build_object('role', $2::text),
                jsonb_build_object('role', $3::text),
                'success'
            )
